note: FEATURE LANE: deploy atlas-bottleneck-sentinel (self-diagnosing+self-healing) - auto-kills stuck DDL/idle-txn/blockers (gridlock prevention), auto-revives lapsed Tier-1 feeds (NRD/CZDS), reports alerts to status/hetzner/sentinel-bottlenecks.json every 60s.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS bottleneck sentinel (self-diagnosing + self-healing)
After=postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=simple
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/atlas_bottleneck_sentinel.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=15
Nice=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
